questions.question: What will Jesse Pollak be wearing at the Frontier Tower event on Friday?
options: A blue hoodie with a Base logo
An orange t-shirt and a whale face
A white t-shirt and a builder hat
A black suit with a crypto tie
questions.explanation: Jesse Pollak stated on April 09, 2026, that he would be at Frontier Tower wearing an orange t-shirt and a whale face.

questions.question: Which company co-authored the Machine Payments Protocol (MPP) with Dan Romero?
questions.explanation: Dan Romero announced on March 18, 2026, that MPP was co-authored with Stripe.

questions.question: On April 11, 2026, which shard was reported as producing blocks again after the network stabilized?
questions.explanation: Jesse Pollak posted that the network was stable and shard 1 was producing blocks on April 11, 2026.

questions.question: Jesse Pollak watched the final of which sports event in March 2026?
questions.explanation: Jesse Pollak mentioned watching the cricket World Cup final on March 09, 2026.

questions.question: Brian Armstrong reported using up his weekly limit of which AI model in just one day?
questions.explanation: On March 08, 2026, Brian Armstrong posted that he used up his Claude Max 20x weekly limit in one day.

questions.question: What does MPP stand for in the context of Dan Romero's recent posts?
questions.explanation: MPP stands for Machine Payments Protocol, launched by Dan Romero and Stripe.

questions.question: What specific distraction did Brian Armstrong spend five hours on due to his ADHD?
questions.explanation: Brian Armstrong mentioned on March 13, 2026, that he spent five hours straight reorganizing cables.

questions.question: Jesse Pollak compared the future of LLMs and agents to which fictional object?
questions.explanation: On January 30, 2026, Jesse stated that Tom Riddle's diary will no longer be fiction due to LLMs and folding displays.

questions.question: What is the primary goal of the company @grin according to Jesse Pollak?
questions.explanation: Jesse Pollak mentioned on February 19, 2026, that @grin is on a mission to 'send bugs right to jail'.

questions.question: What is the URL for the Neynar Studio mentioned in Jesse's posts?
questions.explanation: Jesse Pollak shared the URL neynar.com/studio for building and daily reward credits.

questions.question: Which game did Brian Armstrong share a Farcaster frame for, asking users to play together?
questions.explanation: Brian Armstrong shared a link to pokemon-snap.host.neynar.app on April 09, 2026.

questions.question: Jesse Pollak noted that when it comes to AI, you don't get which two cities?
questions.explanation: On April 12, 2026, Jesse posted: 'when it comes to AI, you don't get a Detroit or a San Jose'.

questions.question: What specific farm did Jesse Pollak's kids start asking for?
questions.explanation: Jesse Pollak posted on February 15, 2026, that his kids are asking for their own /fruitling-valley farms.

questions.question: Which crypto asset did Jesse research for the lowest market order spread on US exchanges?
questions.explanation: Jesse Pollak asked about market order spreads for BTC/USD or BTC/USDC pairs on January 06, 2026.

questions.question: What did Brian Armstrong ask DocGPT about his daily diet?
questions.explanation: Brian Armstrong jokingly asked DocGPT if eating 20 beans every day was bad on March 12, 2026.

questions.question: What was the reported cause for certain wallet balances being priced incorrectly in March 2026?
questions.explanation: Jesse Pollak identified an edge case where tokens with super low liquidity USDC pairs were not priced correctly on March 13, 2026.

questions.question: On what date and time was shard 0 expected to cut over to the updated validator set?
questions.explanation: Jesse Pollak warned of instability on Feb 24 at 12:00 PM UTC during the shard 0 validator cutover.

questions.question: Which cricket team did Jesse Pollak's kids learn wears the color black?
questions.explanation: In his March 09, 2026 post, Jesse mentioned his kids now know New Zealand's colors are black.

questions.question: What was the reported BTC/USD market order spread on Robinhood according to Jesse's research?
questions.explanation: Jesse Pollak noted that Robinhood's spread was 0.85% in his post on January 06, 2026.

questions.question: Whose global p95 latency was reduced by 50% in one day?
questions.explanation: Jesse Pollak highlighted @mcilroyc's 50% reduction in global p95 latency on January 30, 2026.

questions.question: Farcaster scheduled a database layer change on Feb 5, 2026, during which time window?
questions.explanation: Jesse Pollak announced backend database changes on February 05, 2026, between noon and 1 PM PST.

questions.question: What four payment methods were available on Day 1 of the MPP launch?
questions.explanation: Dan Romero listed Tempo (stablecoins), Stripe, Visa, and Lightspark (Bitcoin Lightning) as the Day 1 methods.

questions.question: Who is credited with curating @neynar/ui?
questions.explanation: Jesse Pollak mentioned that @neynar/ui was curated by @obringer.eth in his January 05, 2026 post.

questions.question: What was the 'clutch' move in Dan Romero's personal ATH flight game session?
questions.explanation: Dan Romero stated the 'Invisible -> Brainstorm copy was clutch' in his Balatro-themed post on March 24, 2026.

questions.question: Mircea Pasoi built a Python port of which Farcaster component?
questions.explanation: In April 2023, Mircea Pasoi shared a link to his incomplete Python port of @farcaster/hub-nodejs.

questions.question: Jesse Pollak stated that Neynar infrastructure was being built before which Farcaster feature existed?
questions.explanation: Jesse Pollak posted on January 21, 2026, that he and Rish had been building before hubs were a thing.

questions.question: MPP was submitted as a web standard to which organization?
questions.explanation: Dan Romero's post on March 20, 2026, mentioned that MPP has been submitted to the IETF as a web standard.

questions.question: What was the first role Coinbase (Mircea) was hiring for in November 2023?
questions.explanation: Mircea Pasoi (via the coinbase account) posted on November 17, 2023, that the first role was a product designer.

questions.question: According to Jesse Pollak, what helps improve the Neynar bot faster?
questions.explanation: Jesse Pollak posted on January 21, 2026, that tool call visibility helps improve the bot faster.

questions.question: Jesse Pollak mentioned that Neynar Studio on web includes which of the following new features?
questions.explanation: Jesse's January 23, 2026 post mentioned 'Browse files' as a feature in the Neynar Studio web update.

questions.question: Jesse Pollak mentioned pulling all-nighters in grad school playing games at which lab?
questions.explanation: Jesse Pollak mentioned USC’s GamePipe Lab in his February 14, 2026 post.

questions.question: What was the maintenance window for dev.neynar.com on January 14, 2026?
questions.explanation: Jesse Pollak scheduled upgrades for January 14 (announced Jan 13) between 8-8:30am PST.

questions.question: What reward does Neynar provide for building on neynar.com/studio?
questions.explanation: Jesse Pollak's February 28, 2026 post mentioned 'daily reward credits to build on neynar.com/studio'.

questions.question: Mircea Pasoi shared a blog post in 2023 about discovering he was on which spectrum?
questions.explanation: Mircea Pasoi posted on November 09, 2023, about finding out he is on the autism spectrum.

questions.question: Which country's cricket account did Jesse praise for 'S tier shit posting'?
questions.explanation: Jesse Pollak praised @icelandcricket for their shit posting on January 28, 2026.

questions.question: Dan Romero mentioned building social networks is hard even with how many weekly active users (WAU)?
questions.explanation: On March 24, 2026, Dan Romero posted that building retentive social networks is hard even with 800M WAU.

questions.question: What did Brian Armstrong ask @neynar for an API to check?
options: If a user is a whale
If a user is a builder
If a user is on Base
If a user has a skeleton
questions.explanation: Brian Armstrong asked @neynar for an API to check if a user is a builder (miniapp dev, project owner, etc.) on March 25, 2026.

questions.question: What website did Brian Armstrong discover on March 12, 2026, asking 'how did i just find out about' it?
questions.explanation: Brian Armstrong shared catbox.moe on March 12, 2026.

questions.question: Jesse Pollak mentioned that coding agents have shortened which cycle to make it feel as rewarding as a game?
questions.explanation: On February 14, 2026, Jesse posted that coding agents have shortened the effort-reward cycle.

questions.question: Dan Romero ordered what using Claude in his March 18 post?
questions.explanation: Dan Romero's post on March 18, 2026, said: 'claude order me a sandwich'.

questions.question: Which specific GitHub repository did Brian Armstrong use for 3 days before returning to 'vanilla claude code'?
questions.explanation: Brian Armstrong mentioned using gsd-2 (gsd-build/gsd-2) for 3 days on March 18, 2026.

questions.question: What percentage did Brian Armstrong post on March 25, 2026, without further context?
questions.explanation: Brian Armstrong simply posted '69%' on March 25, 2026.

questions.question: In Jesse Pollak's gradient of features, which feature requests are the most joyful?
questions.explanation: Jesse Pollak posted on January 05, 2026: 'the most joyful feature requests are the ones we've already shipped'.

questions.question: What was the date of the first cast mentioned in the Base official logs?
questions.explanation: The base_official account's first cast was on October 24, 2022.

questions.question: Which specific cards were mentioned in Dan Romero's ' photograph combo'?
questions.explanation: Dan Romero mentioned 'steel cards' and 'bloodstone' in his Balatro-themed post on March 24, 2026.

questions.question: Jesse Pollak noted that Tempo (the machine payments method) launched on which date?
questions.explanation: Dan Romero announced Tempo mainnet was live on March 18, 2026.

questions.question: What was the exact reported cause for Farcaster mobile client degradation on Feb 5, 2026?
questions.explanation: Jesse Pollak warned of degradation due to changes at the database layer on Farcaster's backend.

questions.question: Which external standard body did Dan Romero suggest MPP is being submitted to?
questions.explanation: Dan Romero's post on March 20 stated MPP 'has also been submitted to the IETF as a web standard'.

questions.question: Brian Armstrong shared a video of a 'cool project' on March 14, 2026. What was the GitHub repo?
questions.explanation: Brian Armstrong shared the GitHub link to nikopueringer/CorridorKey on March 14, 2026.

questions.question: Base official account asked for advice on staying consistent in the gym on which date?
questions.explanation: The base_official account posted gym advice questions on March 25, 2023.
